title.zh: 13 日志报错定位与修复建议
title.en: 13 Log Error Diagnosis and Fix Proposal

observation.zh: 检查脚本报告 old-page.html 断链
observation.en: Check script reports broken old-page.html link

observation.zh: 导航或搜索索引仍指向旧 URL
observation.en: Navigation or search index still points to old URL

observation.zh: 生成器数据中找到旧路径
observation.en: Old path found in generator data

observation.zh: 修复后 build/check 均通过

evidenceFile.zh: npm run build && npm run check
evidenceFile.en: npm run build && npm run check

zh: rg -n "old-page|missing local target|recipes/" scripts recipes README.md
npm run build && npm run check && git diff --check
en: rg -n "old-page|missing local target|recipes/" scripts recipes README.md
npm run build && npm run check && git diff --check

zh: 不要顺手重构无关代码。
修复说明必须包含失败命令和复跑命令。
如果日志不足，先补采样日志再下结论。
en: Do not opportunistically refactor unrelated code.
The fix note must include the failing command and rerun command.
If logs are insufficient, collect more log samples before concluding.

trigger.zh: 本地检查失败，需要从日志定位最小修复，不扩大到无关重构。
trigger.en: A local check failed and needed minimal diagnosis from logs without expanding into unrelated refactors.

firstSignal.zh: 错误信息指向旧路径，但搜索结果显示还有多个入口残留。
firstSignal.en: The error pointed to an old path, and search results showed several stale entries.

doneSignal.zh: 只改路径映射和入口链接，复跑检查通过。
doneSignal.en: Only path mapping and entry links were changed, and the rerun passed.
